violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in both microwaves in food prep area.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of in use appliances need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood over griddle has grease buildup.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors walls and ceiling need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked and broken floor tiles in food prep area. -Observed damaged ceiling tiles in food prep area.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed cracked and broken light shields in food prep area.
